zh.Fleet Marston, Buckinghamshire, England: 英國巴金哈姆爾福利特 馬爾斯頓
zh.lifeSummary: Mrs Edward De Verney於大約1356年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾福利特 馬爾斯頓。她於大約1376年與Edward Verney在英國巴金哈姆爾福利特 馬爾斯頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。

zh-hans.Fleet Marston, Buckinghamshire, England: 英国巴金哈姆爾福利特 馬爾斯頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mrs Edward De Verney于大约1356年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾福利特 馬爾斯頓。她于大约1376年与Edward Verney在英国巴金哈姆爾福利特 馬爾斯頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Verney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Varney
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from a French place called Vernay, probably chiefly Saint-Paul-de-Vernay (Calvados). The placename comes from a derivative of Gaulish verno- ‘alder’ + the locative suffix -acum.

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: Mrs Edward De Verney was born about 1356, in Fleet Marston, Buckinghamshire, England. She married Edward Verney about 1376, in Fleet Marston, Buckinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons.

fr.lifeSummary: Mrs Edward De Verney est née environ 1356, à Fleet Marston, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre. Elle a épousé Edward Verney environ 1376, à Fleet Marston, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Mrs Edward De Verney wurde um 1356 in Fleet Marston, Buckinghamshire, England geboren. Sie hat um 1376 in Fleet Marston, Buckinghamshire, England Edward Verney geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne.

it.lifeSummary: Mrs Edward De Verney è nata il circa 1356 nel Fleet Marston, Buckinghamshire, England. Lei sposato Edward Verney circa 1376, nel Fleet Marston, Buckinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli.

ja.Fleet Marston, Buckinghamshire, England: イギリスブクインガムシュアイアフリート マーストン
ja.lifeSummary: Mrs Edward De Verneyは約1356年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアフリート マーストンで生まれた。約1376年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアフリート マーストンでEdward Verneyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Mrs Edward De Verney(은)는 대략 1356년 영국 벅잉함실르 플릿 마스턴에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1376년 영국 벅잉함실르 플릿 마스턴에서 Edward Verney(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mrs Edward De Verney nasceu aproximadamente 1356, em Fleet Marston, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com Edward Verney aproximadamente 1376, em Fleet Marston, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos.

ru.lifeSummary: Mrs Edward De Verney родилась около 1356 г. в местности флит марстон, буккингхамшир, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edward Verney около 1376 г. в местности флит марстон, буккингхамшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына.

es.lifeSummary: Mrs Edward De Verney nació aproximadamente 1356, en Fleet Marston, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Se casó con Edward Verney aproximadamente 1376, en Fleet Marston, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos.
